name: King Resources, Inc.
business: OneSolution Technology Inc. is a holding company that, after a corporate restructuring on September 30, 2024, operates through its subsidiary Heavenly Grace Limited, which is engaged in the arts and collectibles business. The company is currently at the market introduction phase as it prepares to launch its first batch of smart chargers. During the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, the company generated all of its revenue from one customer, Marvel Digital Group Limited, from technical consultancy services.

exposures.sentence: We are currently at the market introduction phase as we are preparing to launch our first batch of smart chargers to the market.

catalysts.event: Launch of first batch of smart chargers
catalysts.sentence: We are currently at the market introduction phase as we are preparing to launch our first batch of smart chargers to the market.
